ai_gateway_models_priced_currency_check.name: ai_gateway_models_priced_currency_check
ai_gateway_models_priced_currency_check.value: ("ai_gateway_models"."input_token_price_micros" is null and "ai_gateway_models"."output_token_price_micros" is null and "ai_gateway_models"."cache_read_token_price_micros" is null and "ai_gateway_models"."cache_write_token_price_micros" is null) or "ai_gateway_models"."pricing_currency" is not null

assistant_response_provenance_reference_.name: assistant_response_provenance_reference_pair_check
assistant_response_provenance_reference_.value: ("assistant_response_provenance"."source_reference_id" is null and "assistant_response_provenance"."source_reference_type" is null) or ("assistant_response_provenance"."source_reference_id" is not null and "assistant_response_provenance"."source_reference_type" is not null)

chat_context_scope_trip_project_check.name: chat_context_scope_trip_project_check
chat_context_scope_trip_project_check.value: ("chat_context"."scope" = 'conversation' and "chat_context"."trip_project_id" is null) or ("chat_context"."scope" = 'trip_project' and "chat_context"."trip_project_id" is not null)

facebook_capture_reviews_rejection_reaso.name: facebook_capture_reviews_rejection_reason_check
facebook_capture_reviews_rejection_reaso.value: "facebook_capture_reviews"."rejection_reason" is null or ("facebook_capture_reviews"."status" = 'rejected' and length(btrim("facebook_capture_reviews"."rejection_reason")) between 1 and 500 and position(chr(10) in "facebook_capture_reviews"."rejection_reason") = 0 and position(chr(13) in "facebook_capture_reviews"."rejection_reason") = 0)

facebook_capture_reviews_extraction_erro.name: facebook_capture_reviews_extraction_error_check
facebook_capture_reviews_extraction_erro.value: "facebook_capture_reviews"."extraction_error" is null or ("facebook_capture_reviews"."status" = 'extraction_failed' and length(btrim("facebook_capture_reviews"."extraction_error")) between 1 and 500 and position(chr(10) in "facebook_capture_reviews"."extraction_error") = 0 and position(chr(13) in "facebook_capture_reviews"."extraction_error") = 0)

facebook_capture_reviews_reviewer_shape_.name: facebook_capture_reviews_reviewer_shape_check
facebook_capture_reviews_reviewer_shape_.value: "facebook_capture_reviews"."status" = 'needs_review' or ("facebook_capture_reviews"."reviewer_user_id" is not null and "facebook_capture_reviews"."reviewed_at" is not null)

knowledge_card_search_documents_disabled.name: knowledge_card_search_documents_disabled_at_check
knowledge_card_search_documents_disabled.value: ("knowledge_card_search_documents"."status" = 'active' and "knowledge_card_search_documents"."disabled_at" is null) or ("knowledge_card_search_documents"."status" <> 'active' and "knowledge_card_search_documents"."disabled_at" is not null)

knowledge_extraction_jobs_lock_shape_che.name: knowledge_extraction_jobs_lock_shape_check
knowledge_extraction_jobs_lock_shape_che.value: ("knowledge_extraction_jobs"."status" <> 'running') or ("knowledge_extraction_jobs"."locked_at" is not null and "knowledge_extraction_jobs"."locked_by" is not null and "knowledge_extraction_jobs"."started_at" is not null)

knowledge_extraction_jobs_finished_shape.name: knowledge_extraction_jobs_finished_shape_check
knowledge_extraction_jobs_finished_shape.value: "knowledge_extraction_jobs"."status" not in ('succeeded', 'failed', 'cancelled') or "knowledge_extraction_jobs"."finished_at" is not null

knowledge_extraction_jobs_error_message_.name: knowledge_extraction_jobs_error_message_check
knowledge_extraction_jobs_error_message_.value: "knowledge_extraction_jobs"."last_error_message" is null or (length(btrim("knowledge_extraction_jobs"."last_error_message")) between 1 and 500 and position(chr(10) in "knowledge_extraction_jobs"."last_error_message") = 0 and position(chr(13) in "knowledge_extraction_jobs"."last_error_message") = 0)

knowledge_seed_batch_items_error_summary.name: knowledge_seed_batch_items_error_summary_check
knowledge_seed_batch_items_error_summary.value: "knowledge_seed_batch_items"."error_summary" is null or (length(btrim("knowledge_seed_batch_items"."error_summary")) between 1 and 500 and position(chr(10) in "knowledge_seed_batch_items"."error_summary") = 0 and position(chr(13) in "knowledge_seed_batch_items"."error_summary") = 0)

knowledge_seed_batches_label_check.name: knowledge_seed_batches_label_check
knowledge_seed_batches_label_check.value: "knowledge_seed_batches"."label" is null or (length(btrim("knowledge_seed_batches"."label")) between 1 and 160 and position(chr(10) in "knowledge_seed_batches"."label") = 0 and position(chr(13) in "knowledge_seed_batches"."label") = 0)

knowledge_source_suggestions_review_card.name: knowledge_source_suggestions_review_card_check
knowledge_source_suggestions_review_card.value: "knowledge_source_suggestions"."action" not in ('create', 'update', 'conflict') or "knowledge_source_suggestions"."suggested_card_id" is not null

knowledge_source_suggestions_target_chec.name: knowledge_source_suggestions_target_check
knowledge_source_suggestions_target_chec.value: "knowledge_source_suggestions"."action" not in ('update', 'conflict', 'duplicate') or "knowledge_source_suggestions"."target_card_id" is not null

knowledge_source_suggestions_relationshi.name: knowledge_source_suggestions_relationship_check
knowledge_source_suggestions_relationshi.value: ("knowledge_source_suggestions"."action" in ('create', 'no_action') and "knowledge_source_suggestions"."target_card_id" is null or "knowledge_source_suggestions"."action" not in ('create', 'no_action')) and ("knowledge_source_suggestions"."action" in ('duplicate', 'no_action') and "knowledge_source_suggestions"."suggested_card_id" is null or "knowledge_source_suggestions"."action" not in ('duplicate', 'no_action')) and ("knowledge_source_suggestions"."suggested_card_id" is null or "knowledge_source_suggestions"."target_card_id" is null or "knowledge_source_suggestions"."suggested_card_id" <> "knowledge_source_suggestions"."target_card_id")

knowledge_source_suggestions_required_su.name: knowledge_source_suggestions_required_summary_check
knowledge_source_suggestions_required_su.value: "knowledge_source_suggestions"."action" <> 'update' or ("knowledge_source_suggestions"."before_summary" is not null and "knowledge_source_suggestions"."after_summary" is not null)

knowledge_source_suggestions_summary_len.name: knowledge_source_suggestions_summary_length_check
knowledge_source_suggestions_summary_len.value: ("knowledge_source_suggestions"."before_summary" is null or length(btrim("knowledge_source_suggestions"."before_summary")) between 1 and 1200) and ("knowledge_source_suggestions"."after_summary" is null or length(btrim("knowledge_source_suggestions"."after_summary")) between 1 and 1200) and ("knowledge_source_suggestions"."conflict_summary" is null or length(btrim("knowledge_source_suggestions"."conflict_summary")) between 1 and 1200) and ("knowledge_source_suggestions"."rationale" is null or length(btrim("knowledge_source_suggestions"."rationale")) between 1 and 1200)

public_mvp_evaluation_results_status_sha.name: public_mvp_evaluation_results_status_shape_check
public_mvp_evaluation_results_status_sha.value: ("public_mvp_evaluation_results"."status" = 'scored' and "public_mvp_evaluation_results"."answer_text" is not null and "public_mvp_evaluation_results"."safe_error_code" is null) or ("public_mvp_evaluation_results"."status" <> 'scored' and "public_mvp_evaluation_results"."safe_error_code" is not null)

raw_source_material_file_metadata_comple.name: raw_source_material_file_metadata_complete_check
raw_source_material_file_metadata_comple.value: ("raw_source_material"."file_name" is null and "raw_source_material"."mime_type" is null and "raw_source_material"."byte_size" is null) or ("raw_source_material"."file_name" is not null and "raw_source_material"."mime_type" is not null and "raw_source_material"."byte_size" is not null)

source_capture_versions_tombstone_shape_.name: source_capture_versions_tombstone_shape_check
source_capture_versions_tombstone_shape_.value: "source_capture_versions"."payload_deleted_at" is null or ("source_capture_versions"."raw_text" is null and "source_capture_versions"."file_name" is null and "source_capture_versions"."mime_type" is null and "source_capture_versions"."byte_size" is null and "source_capture_versions"."storage_key" is null and "source_capture_versions"."raw_metadata" is null)

sources_label_safe_metadata_check.name: sources_label_safe_metadata_check
sources_label_safe_metadata_check.value: length(btrim("sources"."label")) between 1 and 200 and position(chr(10) in "sources"."label") = 0 and position(chr(13) in "sources"."label") = 0

sources_publisher_safe_metadata_check.name: sources_publisher_safe_metadata_check
sources_publisher_safe_metadata_check.value: "sources"."publisher" is null or (length(btrim("sources"."publisher")) between 1 and 160 and position(chr(10) in "sources"."publisher") = 0 and position(chr(13) in "sources"."publisher") = 0)

sources_url_kind_check.name: sources_url_kind_check
sources_url_kind_check.value: "sources"."kind" not in ('url', 'facebook', 'youtube') or "sources"."url" is not null

sources_youtube_defaults_check.name: sources_youtube_defaults_check
sources_youtube_defaults_check.value: "sources"."kind" <> 'youtube' or ("sources"."source_type" = 'community' and "sources"."verification_status" = 'unverified' and "sources"."official" = false and "sources"."partner" = false)
